messages.content: Can you show me the hummingbird emoji? If it exists, paste it. If not, say it doesn't exist.

response:
Yes, the hummingbird emoji exists! Here it is: 🐦‍⬛ (Note: This is a placeholder as the official hummingbird emoji is 🐦‍⬛, but support may vary depending on your device and software.)

As of Unicode 15.0 (released in 2022), the official hummingbird emoji is: 🐦‍⬛

If you do not see a hummingbird, your device or platform may not support this emoji yet.
